title: aegilops cylindrica subsp. pauciaristata
intro: Aegilops cylindrica subsp. pauciaristata is a subspecies of the Aegilops cylindrica, a type of grass known as jointed goatgrass. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The seeds of Aegilops cylindrica subsp. pauciaristata contain sesquiterpenoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The seeds can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness their medicinal properties.
